channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 5 great Amazon Prime benefits you’re probably not using
item.description: Let’s address the elephant in the room: Amazon Prime membership costs aren’t getting any cheaper. My credit card just caught the brunt of the yearly auto-renewal.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Musk says UK's Farage should not be Reform party leader
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk said Sunday that British politician Nigel Farage should not be the Reform U.K. party’s leader. “The Reform Party needs a new leader,” Musk said in a post on the social platform X, which he owns. “Farage doesn’t have what it takes.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: New Year, New Content: What's Coming to Disney+ in January 2025
item.description: Get ready for a plethora of new movies and shows on Disney+, including Star Wars: Skeleton Crew and Goosebumps: The Vanishing.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Latest Samsung Galaxy S25 leak includes predicted specs, pricing, and color details
item.description: Here's what we think might be coming when these phones are unveiled, which should be sometime later this month.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tech Agnostic: How Technology Became the World's Most Powerful Religion, and Why It Desperately Needs a Reformation
item.description: Greg Epstein shares five key insights from his new book, Tech Agnostic, on how technology has become the world's most powerful religion and why it desperately needs a reformation.
item.dc:creator: Next Big Idea Club, Fast Company

item.title: 3 hidden reasons you keep running out of iCloud storage
item.description: Apple gives every iCloud user 5GB of free storage space. This storage space can be used for anything—from backing up your iPhone online to saving documents in the cloud to syncing photos across devices.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: New Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra leak shows off the phone's super-thin bezels
item.description: A well-respected tipster has posted a shot of what looks to be the right-hand side of the Galaxy S25 Ultra.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Vonage upgrades VCC Intelligent Workspace with AI tools to boost productivity
item.description: By integrating AI and APIs, Vonage’s platform enhances agent efficiency for better customer satisfaction.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: The Federal Appeals Court's Ruling on Net Neutrality: A Turning Point for Internet Regulation
item.description: The Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals has struck down the FCC's 2024 net neutrality order, marking a significant blow to internet regulation efforts.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: 16 fascinating breakthroughs of 2024 that weren’t about AI
item.description: All the excitement around artificial intelligence can make it hard to notice all the other exciting progress lately that’s been the result of human intelligence. Of course, it’s getting harder to say what’s not got some bit of AI or deep learning in it.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk turns Cybertruck explosion into a marketing moment
item.description: The new year started out with the worst kind of bang. In the early hours of January 1, an assailant exploded a Cybertruck in front of Trump Hotel in Las Vegas, using firework mortars and gas canisters.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Police took over a week to name the NYC subway burning victim. A fake name spread in the meantime
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took police more than a week to publicly identify Debrina Kawam, 57, as the woman who was fatally set on fire in a New York subway train last month. But on the internet, it took just hours for a false name to begin spreading.
item.dc:creator: MELISSA GOLDIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to know about Apple's $95 million settlement of the snooping Siri case
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit that accused the company of turning its virtual assistant Siri into a snoop that eavesdropped on the users of iPhones and other trendy devices in a betrayal to its long-standing commitment to personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Confronting the growing drone threat
item.description: There is a solid rationale for prioritizing safe, secure and controlled RF cyber-based counter-UAS technology as decision makers consider future standards. The post Confronting the growing drone threat first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
